nasb.text: They will not return to the land of Egypt; But Assyria—he will be their king Because they refused to return to Me.

esv.text: They shall not return to the land of Egypt, but Assyria shall be their king, because they have refused to return to me.

cnv.text: “他們必返回埃及地， 亞述要作他們的王； 因為他們不肯回來歸我。

ccb.text: “他们要返回埃及， 亚述要统治他们， 因为他们不肯归向我。
